# CLKComplicationTemplateModularSmallColumnsText

**Class**

A template for displaying two rows and two columns of text.

## Declaration

```swift
class CLKComplicationTemplateModularSmallColumnsText
```

## Overview

This template belongs to the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationFamily/modularSmall] family.



## Creating the Template

- **init(row1Column1TextProvider:row1Column2TextProvider:row2Column1TextProvider:row2Column2TextProvider:)**: Creates a new template that has two columns of text.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **row1Column1TextProvider**: The text to display in the first column of the first row.
- **row1Column2TextProvider**: The text to display in the second column of the first row.
- **row2Column1TextProvider**: The text to display in the first column of the second row.
- **row2Column2TextProvider**: The text to display in the second column of the second row.
- **column2Alignment**: The alignment of the text in the second column.
- **highlightColumn2**: A Boolean value indicating which column should be drawn with a highlight.

## Text templates

- **CLKComplicationTemplateModularSmallRingText**: A template for displaying text encircled by a configurable progress ring.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateModularSmallSimpleText**: A template for displaying a small amount of text.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateModularSmallStackText**: A template for displaying two strings stacked one on top of the other.

## Inherits From

- CLKComplicationTemplate

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
